content.content:
100	    """Return the best update command for the current installation."""
101	    return get_managed_update_command() or "hermes update"
102	
103	
104	def format_managed_message(action: str = "modify this Hermes installation") -> str:
105	    """Build a user-facing error for managed installs."""
106	    managed_system = get_managed_system() or "a package manager"
107	    raw = os.getenv("HERMES_MANAGED", "").strip().lower()
108	
109	    if managed_system == "NixOS":
110	        env_hint = "true" if raw in _MANAGED_TRUE_VALUES else raw or "true"
111	        return (
112	            f"Cannot {action}: this Hermes installation is managed by NixOS "
113	            f"(HERMES_MANAGED={env_hint}).\n"
114	            "Edit services.hermes-agent.settings in your configuration.nix and run:\n"
115	            "  sudo nixos-rebuild switch"
116	        )
117	
118	    if managed_system == "Homebrew":
119	        env_hint = raw or "homebrew"
120	        return (
121	            f"Cannot {action}: this Hermes installation is managed by Homebrew "
122	            f"(HERMES_MANAGED={env_hint}).\n"
123	            "Use:\n"
124	            "  brew upgrade hermes-agent"
125	        )
126	
127	    return (
128	        f"Cannot {action}: this Hermes installation is managed by {managed_system}.\n"
129	        "Use your package manager to upgrade or reinstall Hermes."
130	    )
131	
132	def managed_error(action: str = "modify configuration"):
133	    """Print user-friendly error for managed mode."""
134	    print(format_managed_message(action), file=sys.stderr)
135

137	# =============================================================================
138	# Config paths
139	# =============================================================================
140	
141	# Re-export from hermes_constants — canonical definition lives there.
142	from hermes_constants import get_hermes_home  # noqa: F811,E402
143	
144	def get_config_path() -> Path:
145	    """Get the main config file path."""
146	    return get_hermes_home() / "config.yaml"
147	
148	def get_env_path() -> Path:
149	    """Get the .env file path (for API keys)."""
150	    return get_hermes_home() / ".env"
151	
152	def get_project_root() -> Path:
153	    """Get the project installation directory."""
154	    return Path(__file__).parent.parent.resolve()
155	
156	def _secure_dir(path):
157	    """Set directory to owner-only access (0700). No-op on Windows."""
158	    try:
159	        os.chmod(path, 0o700)
160	    except (OSError, NotImplementedError):
161	        pass
162	
163	
164	def _secure_file(path):
165	    """Set file to owner-only read/write (0600). No-op on Windows."""
166	    try:
167	        if os.path.exists(str(path)):
168	            os.chmod(path, 0o600)
169	    except (OSError, NotImplementedError):
170	        pass
171	
172	
173	def _ensure_default_soul_md(home: Path) -> None:
174	    """Seed a default SOUL.md into HERMES_HOME if the user doesn't have one yet."""
175	    soul_path = home / "SOUL.md"
176	    if soul_path.exists():
177	        return
178	    soul_path.write_text(DEFAULT_SOUL_MD, encoding="utf-8")
179	    _secure_file(soul_path)
180	
181	
182	def ensure_hermes_home():
183	    """Ensure ~/.hermes directory structure exists with secure permissions."""
184	    home = get_hermes_home()
185	    home.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
186	    _secure_dir(home)
187	    for subdir in ("cron", "sessions", "logs", "memories"):
188	        d = home / subdir
189	        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
190	        _secure_dir(d)
191	    _ensure_default_soul_md(home)
192
